pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which use grep -r -i 'park' to search preferences. This term correctly matches Sygic GPS Navigation's parking-related features including 'Offer Parking', 'Place on route', and 'Parked Car' features.

Code analysis of export_result.sh line 39 which checks for these patterns in Android SharedPreferences: grep -iE 'park.*(true|1|"value":1)'. These are standard Android SharedPreferences value formats for boolean settings.

pi_items.verified_value: Feature name does not match documented Sygic features. Actual parking-related settings in Sygic GPS Navigation are: 1) 'Offer Parking' notification (offers parking suggestions before destination), 2) 'Place on route' notification (suggests parking, petrol, rest areas), 3) 'Parked Car' feature (premium subscription for saving parking location), 4) 'Free Parking Reminder' (iOS primarily, notification for free parking expiration)
pi_items.source: Web search and documentation analysis: Official Sygic documentation (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/settings), Sygic blog (https://www.sygic.com/blog/2016/new-ios-feature-free-parking-reminder), Sygic feature page (https://www.sygic.com/what-is/parked-car), Notifications documentation (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/1/en/topic/notifications). No exact match found for 'Parking place reminder' in any official documentation.

privileged_info_summary: Sygic GPS Navigation is a real GPS navigation app (package: com.sygic.aura) with parking-related features. The task searches for parking settings using the term 'park' in Android SharedPreferences with expected values 'true', '1', or 'on', which are valid Android settings formats. However, the feature name 'Parking place reminder' does not match any documented Sygic feature. Official Sygic features include 'Offer Parking' (destination-based notification), 'Place on route' (en-route parking suggestions), 'Parked Car' (premium location-saving feature), and 'Free Parking Reminder' (iOS-primary expiration notification). The actual feature name being toggled in this task is not verified.
